query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "mcompassrag: topic metadata as a semantic compass for paragraph-level " linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on robotic object-goal navigation and semantic mapping in physical or simulated 3D environments, which is an off-domain application of "semantic exploration" compared to the user's question about LLM retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and linguistic topic metadata. While both involve "semantics," the constructs (robotic path planning vs. text retrieval) and domains (robotics vs. NLP) are distinct, failing the criteria for same-mechanism evidence or shared domain variables.
